Product Guide — Vexatrail 55.
The Vexatrail 55 is part of our backpacks range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

events.content: The Vexatrail 55 backpack comes with a one-year limited warranty. You can find more detailed information in our Product Guide documents available on our website or by consulting the product catalog for current price and stock details, as well as return windows and warranty coverage policies specific to the category of backpacks.
